title: Harmonize ≥5 datasets (matrices + metadata)
context: Cross-dataset analysis requires harmonizing ≥5 datasets to a common gene space and annotation version while preserving per-cell-of-origin provenance (PLAN §8 M2). Redistribution is gated on per-source license. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Harmonize ≥5 reprocessed datasets onto a common gene space + annotation version, preserving provenance, and publish matrices only where every source permits redistribution.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 5 datasets harmonized to a common gene space + annotation version; provenance per cell of origin preserved.
Redistribution of harmonized matrices only where every contributing source permits; otherwise recipe + accessions are published instead.
Harmonization is reproducible from a one-command run with a provenance manifest.
output: output/harmonized/ (common-gene-space matrices + harmonized metadata, or recipe+accessions where redistribution is barred).
